description: 小清新薄荷 - 薄荷绿 + 圆角卡片,轻盈透气,适合日常 / 生活方式 / 轻话题

styles.body: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 15.5px; color: #1f3a33; line-height: 1.85; letter-spacing: 0.35px; word-spacing: 1.5px; padding: 20px 22px; background: #f4faf7;
styles.h1: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #0f5a4a; text-align: left; margin: 34px 0 22px; padding: 16px 20px; background: #cfeadd; border-radius: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; line-height: 1.5;
styles.h2: font-size: 17.5px; font-weight: 700; color: #0f5a4a; margin: 38px 0 18px; padding: 8px 14px; background: #e4f3ec; border-radius: 10px; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.3px; display: inline-block;
styles.h3: font-size: 15.5px; font-weight: 700; color: #1f3a33; margin: 28px 0 12px; padding: 0 0 0 12px; border-left: 3px solid #4fb896; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.p: margin: 16px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #1f3a33; line-height: 1.9;
styles.blockquote: margin: 24px 0; padding: 18px 22px; background: #e4f3ec; border-left: none; color: #0f5a4a; font-size: 14.5px; border-radius: 14px; line-height: 1.85; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 14px; margin: 24px auto; display: block; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(79,184,150,0.15); border: 1px solid #cfeadd;
styles.strong: color: #0f5a4a; font-weight: 800; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 62%, #b8e5d2 62%, #b8e5d2 95%, transparent 95%); padding: 1px 6px;
styles.code_inline: background: #e4f3ec; color: #0f5a4a; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; border: 1px solid #cfeadd;
styles.code_block: background: #1a2f29; color: #cfeadd; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 14px; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.65; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre; margin: 24px 0; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; -moz-tab-size: 2; tab-size: 2; font-variant-ligatures: none; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
styles.ol: margin: 18px 0; padding-left: 0; list-style: none; counter-reset: list;
styles.li_bullet: color: #4fb896; font-weight: 900; font-size: 14px; display: inline-block; min-width: 16px; margin-right: 8px; text-align: left;
styles.li_number: color: #4fb896; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; min-width: 22px; display: inline-block; margin-right: 10px;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #4fb896, transparent); margin: 38px 0; opacity: 0.5;
styles.a: color: #0f5a4a; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(15,90,74,0.4);
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 24px 0; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #cfeadd; table-layout: fixed; word-break: break-word;
styles.th: background: #4fb896; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 12px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.5px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.5;
styles.td: padding: 10px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e4f3ec; color: #1f3a33; font-size: 13px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.55;
styles.caption: font-size: 12.5px; color: #7a9a90; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #4fb896; letter-spacing: 14px; font-size: 13px; margin: 36px 0; user-select: none; opacity: 0.6;

highlights.hl_yellow: background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 58%, #fcf2a8 58%); color: #1f3a33; padding: 1px 6px; font-weight: 600;

list_style.label: A · 薄荷胶囊
list_style.num_container: display: inline-block; background: #4fb896; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 11px; min-width: 28px; height: 20px; line-height: 20px; text-align: center; border-radius: 10px; margin-right: 12px; vertical-align: 2px; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
list_style.bullet_container: display: inline-block; width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #4fb896; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 12px; vertical-align: 3px;
